report.summary: Community v4 cycle: Drafted 5 tweets (#188-192) covering Sacks exit as White House crypto czar, extreme fear contrarian thread, Initia/Kite AI guides going live, CLARITY Act stablecoin progress, and BlackRock staked ETH trust. Created Discord/TG evening update and Newsletter v31 section. Designed SVG social card: Sacks Exit & Policy Shift (1200x630 with market stats, policy timeline, fear gauge). 560 pages now live.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #188: Sacks Exit & Crypto Policy — David Sacks hits 130-day limit, steps down as White House crypto czar. Legacy: pro-crypto framework, stablecoin legislation, SEC classifications. CLARITY Act continues. Links to regulations guide. Scheduled: Fri Mar 27, 8PM ET.

Tweet #189: Extreme Fear → Opportunity thread (4 parts) — F&G at 13, 48-day streak, Jun 2022 (F&G 6) led to +432%, Nov 2022 (F&G 20) led to +349%. Iran conflict + ETF outflows + Sacks exit driving fear. Links to fear-greed-timeline + DCA calculator. Scheduled: Sat Mar 28, 11AM ET.
Tweet #190: 560 Pages + New Guides — Initia (interwoven L1) and Kite AI (AI payment blockchain) guides now live. Platform milestone. Scheduled: Sat Mar 28, 3PM ET.

Tweet #191: Stablecoin Regulation Progress — CLARITY Act yield treatment agreement in principle between Senators Tillis & Alsobrooks. $311B stablecoin market. Links to yield-bearing stablecoins guide. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 12PM ET.
Tweet #192: BlackRock Staked ETH Trust — ETHB launched Mar 12, first major TradFi staked ETH product. ETH at $1,989 below $2K. Links to ETF guide. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 4PM ET.
Discord/TG: Evening Update — Sacks exit, BTC $66,587 (-4.1%), ETH $1,989, F&G 13, Iran conflict, CLARITY Act progress. New Initia + Kite AI guides. Tool links.

Newsletter v31 Section: Sacks Exit & Fear Streak Deepens — market pulse (BTC $66,587, ETH $1,989, F&G 13, 48-day streak), 2 new guides, CLARITY Act update, BlackRock ETHB context, contrarian DCA signal in degen corner.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: Sacks Exit & Policy Shift (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism design with POLICY SHIFT badge. Headline: 'White House Crypto Czar Steps Down'. 4 stat cards: BTC $66,587 (-4.1%), ETH $1,989 (below $2K), F&G 13 (48-day streak), Stablecoin Mktcap $311B (12.7%). Two column layout: 'What Sacks Got Done' (pro-crypto framework, CLARITY Act, SEC classifications) and 'What's Next' (CLARITY Act advancing, bipartisan agreement, BlackRock ETHB live). Fear gauge bar at 13%. CTA linking crypto-regulations-2026. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-27-social-card-sacks-exit-policy.svg
